SELL review: 8
Catalyst watch: 1

- 229200 KODEX KOSDAQ150 score 5 US 3 BUY 1 news 3 yt 0

- 329180 HD Hyundai Heavy Industries score -6 SELL 4 news 2

- 207940 Samsung Biologics score 6 news 3 yt 0
